subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy most sweet-sounding Call, and by Thy Most Great and Most Glorious Name, and by Thy Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم اسئلک بندائک الاحلی و باسم اسمک الاعظم الابهی و بکتابک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for prosperity, @Greatest Name
